name: Philip Glass
abstract: Philip Morris Glass (born January 31, 1937) is an American composer and pianist. He is widely regarded as one of the most influential composers of the late 20th century.

about_quotes.speaker: John Beal
about_quotes.evidence: I played a couple of film scores with him, played some incidental music for a Beckett play that he wrote for tympani and double bass.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Beal interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 18, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Vince Giordano
about_quotes.evidence: I mean we still play Mozart, Brahms and Beethoven along with Philip Glass and who everyone else say is contemporary
about_quotes.doc_title: Vince Giordano interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 11, 2007
